description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

Azure Front Door is a global, scalable entry-point that uses Microsoft's edge network to deliver fast, secure web applications. The REST API manages profiles, endpoints, routes, origins, and WAF policies.
